log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 25/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 25/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 25/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
